summary: Second test run complete. All new features tested successfully. Backend: 29/29 tests passed (11 new tests for enhanced admin panel features). Frontend: All critical flows working including free registration, admin condominium management, user association features, and pending banner.

issues: shadow* style props deprecated warnings still present (non-breaking, already noted in iteration 1)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Registration no longer requires invite code - codice_invito field removed from UI
✓ POST /api/auth/register works without validation of invite code
✓ Admin panel expanded to 6 tabs (Dashboard, Condomini, Utenti, Segnalazioni, Appuntamenti, Avvisi)
✓ POST /api/condomini - admin can create new condominiums
✓ GET /api/admin/utenti - returns users with associazioni array and abilitato flag
✓ POST /api/admin/associa-utente - admin can associate users to condominiums
✓ DELETE /api/admin/associazione/{id} - admin can remove user associations
✓ Home page displays yellow pending banner for users without condominium (abilitato=false)
✓ All testID attributes properly implemented for admin panel interactive elements
✓ Duplicate association prevention working (400 error if user already associated to same condominium)
✓ Role-based access control working correctly (condomino cannot access admin endpoints)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing data from iteration 1 used. Multiple test users created during tests (with timestamps in email addresses) to verify registration and association flows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All enhanced admin panel features tested and working. New features include: 1) Free registration without invite code, 2) Admin can CRUD condominiums, 3) Admin can associate/disassociate users to condominiums, 4) Users without condominium see pending banner. Backend has comprehensive pytest suite (29 tests). Frontend flows verified with Playwright. No blocking issues.

tested_flows: Register page - no invite code field visible
Admin login redirects to admin panel
Admin panel Dashboard tab with 6 stats cards
Admin panel Condomini tab - list view with 5 condominiums
Admin panel Condomini tab - 'Nuovo Condominio' button opens modal
Admin panel Condomini tab - create condominium modal with all fields
Admin panel Condomini tab - delete buttons visible for each condominium
Admin panel Utenti tab - list view with 14 users
Admin panel Utenti tab - users show abilitato status (green/yellow dot)
Admin panel Utenti tab - users show association details with condominium names
Admin panel Utenti tab - disassociate buttons (red X) visible for associated users
Admin panel Utenti tab - 'Associa a condominio' button opens modal
Admin panel Utenti tab - association modal with condominium picker, unità immobiliare input, qualità picker
Home page - new user registration and login
Home page - pending banner visible for user without condominium association
Home page - 8 tiles visible for regular user
Home page - admin panel button NOT visible for regular user

free_registration.details: Users can register without invite code. Registration form no longer shows invite code field. Backend accepts registration with empty codice_invito.

admin_condominium_management.details: Admin can create new condominiums via POST /api/condomini. Admin can delete condominiums via DELETE /api/condomini/{id}. UI shows 'Nuovo Condominio' button and delete buttons for each condominium.

admin_user_association.details: GET /api/admin/utenti returns users with associazioni array and abilitato flag. Admin can associate users to condominiums via POST /api/admin/associa-utente. Admin can remove associations via DELETE /api/admin/associazione/{id}. UI shows association details and controls.

pending_banner.details: Users without condominium association (abilitato=false) see yellow pending banner on home page with message 'Account in attesa di abilitazione' and explanation text.

admin_panel_tabs.details: Admin panel now has 6 tabs: Dashboard, Condomini, Utenti, Segnalazioni, Appuntamenti, Avvisi. All tabs are functional and properly styled.
